form.formComment: Last start just off the speed and boxed on; posted a big 5.5 m win as favourite (Fr2) at this track (2:43.60) beating Jaxon Beach in NR 64 to 75 on April 7 at $3.10 at the bell was 2nd-4.2. The ace draw gives him every chance to strike again.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Prioritise at this track over 1790m in a NR 65 or better on March 20 at $6. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Bizzness Class at this track over 2190m in a NR 64 to 75 on April 7 at $5. Major player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Withstood an early challenge for the lead from Rio Rock.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth after a quick start, behind Bizzness Class at this track over 2190m in a NR 64 to 75 on April 7 at $4.60. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr6) over 1750m after showing early pace at Swan Hill, at the bell was leading 0.7 beaten 1.5 m by Ideal Bandit (2:04.30) in NR 56 to 64 on March 31 at $19. Broke last time but was racing well prior so worth another chance.

form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Bizzness Class, a rival who he faces again; when 45 metres seventh at this track over 2190m in a NR 64 to 75 race on April 7. Cannot enthuse on what we have seen of late.
